programme.title: Back For You Ep11
programme.desc: After a harrowing escape from a gang, Officer A Lai obtains clues for his cases from an unlikely source: the comics belonging to his rescuer, who has fallen into a coma due to her injuries.

programme.title: Fox Demon Legend
programme.desc: Girls vanish in a remote village. Li Chang Xiao hunts for his missing disciple Luo Shui, uncovering fox legends, deadly secrets and a dark twisting conspiracy.

programme.title: Our Dazzling Days Ep30
programme.desc: Orphan Zhang Xiao Man grows up in the factory town alongside Yan Xiao Dan and Xia Lei, navigating friendship, first love, and challenges, as they pursue dreams amid the factories' decline.

programme.title: The Great Nobody Ep01
programme.desc: Tu Dou and Lu Yan star in a comedy with Tang Xiaotian's special appearance. Panda Fairy Ling Ling is mistaken for a king, leading with Mole Advisor to grow the demon den.

programme.title: The Great Nobody Ep02
programme.desc: Tu Dou and Lu Yan star in a comedy with Tang Xiaotian's special appearance. Panda Fairy Ling Ling is mistaken for a king, leading with Mole Advisor to grow the demon den.

programme.title: To the Wonder Ep08
programme.desc: After failing to realise her literary dreams in the big city, Li Wen Xiu reluctantly returns to her mother. But meeting Kazakh boy Batay reminded Wen Xiu of the beauty of her hometown in Altay.

programme.title: Drifting Away Ep01
programme.desc: Detective Peng Zhao Lin begins a ten-year hunt for four killers who evaded justice by laundering their identities. All while, he is relentlessly investigating a brutal dismemberment case.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep11
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep12
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: Tell No One Ep09
programme.desc: Ou Hao, Li YiTong, Zhang Guo Qiang, and Liu Yi Jun star in a gripping crime thriller. A veteran cop disappears, leaving a young undercover agent to unravel the mystery.

programme.title: Tell No One Ep10
programme.desc: Ou Hao, Li YiTong, Zhang Guo Qiang, and Liu Yi Jun star in a gripping crime thriller. A veteran cop disappears, leaving a young undercover agent to unravel the mystery.

programme.desc: After a harrowing escape from a gang, Officer A Lai obtains clues for his cases from an unlikely source: the comics belonging to his rescuer, who has fallen into a coma due to her injuries.

programme.title: Drifting Away Ep01
programme.desc: Detective Peng Zhao Lin begins a ten-year hunt for four killers who evaded justice by laundering their identities. All while, he is relentlessly investigating a brutal dismemberment case.

programme.title: This Thriving Land Ep19
programme.desc: Portraying the rise and fall of the Ning, Feng & Fei families across two generations, as well as their entwined fates and enduring bonds forged by their struggle & love for the same land they call home.

programme.title: This Thriving Land Ep20
programme.desc: Portraying the rise and fall of the Ning, Feng & Fei families across two generations, as well as their entwined fates and enduring bonds forged by their struggle & love for the same land they call home.

programme.desc: After a harrowing escape from a gang, Officer A Lai obtains clues for his cases from an unlikely source: the comics belonging to his rescuer, who has fallen into a coma due to her injuries.

programme.title: The Comic Bang Ep01
programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.desc: Tu Dou and Lu Yan star in a comedy with Tang Xiaotian's special appearance. Panda Fairy Ling Ling is mistaken for a king, leading with Mole Advisor to grow the demon den.

programme.title: Peak Confrontation
programme.desc: Gangster Chu Tian Kuo involuntarily participates in a competition to win the golden mask. But during the struggle for the mask, he is framed & subsequently rescued by the princess of a foreign tribe.
